commitments.expected_result: runtime accepts only current structured result bodies or reissues the current packet
commitments.failure_boundary: unsupported fields, prose, stale packets, and aliases are rejected
commitments.label: Current packet results use only current result contracts.
commitments.rationale: Runtime must fail closed on unsupported result shapes.

commitments.expected_result: runtime rejects the old package and names the current repair or reissue path
commitments.failure_boundary: no old package, fallback cache, alias, or prose result may become success
commitments.label: Repair and reissue stay on the current package/result/blocker path.
commitments.rationale: Repeated and stale submissions are audit records, not alternate success paths.
commitments.trigger: current packet result is missing required data or repeats an old accepted package

commitments.actor: worker, FlowGuard operator, or reviewer role
commitments.expected_result: runtime requires and relays pm_visible_summary but never synthesizes semantic content
commitments.failure_boundary: missing summary blocks mechanically; summary text never substitutes for sealed body review
commitments.label: PM-visible summaries are role-authored current fields.
commitments.rationale: Runtime can require the field but cannot perform semantic reviewer quality checks.
commitments.trigger: formal non-PM role result body is submitted

commitments.expected_result: assigned role receives and uses the authorized current material before submit-result
commitments.failure_boundary: recent summaries and ordinary file access do not satisfy required sealed-body reads
commitments.label: Authorized result reads are required material, not optional summaries.
commitments.rationale: This keeps summary navigation separate from formal evidence consumption.
commitments.validation_boundary: authorized material opening and receipt validation

commitments.expected_result: routine-green evidence is separated from current release-suite evidence
commitments.failure_boundary: stale full proofs and deferred release suites block broad claims
commitments.label: Release and done claims require current model/test/install evidence.
commitments.rationale: A project upgrade record is not itself validation proof.
commitments.trigger: maintenance, done, release, or publish confidence is claimed

ledger.project_boundary: FlowPilot current-contract runtime, prompts, models, tests, and install sync
ledger.rationale: Registers the user-visible no-fallback and evidence freshness promises before broad confidence claims.

source_surfaces.label: surface.runtime.submit_result
source_surfaces.rationale: Maps a current behavior surface to one behavior commitment.

source_surfaces.label: surface.runtime.repair_reissue
source_surfaces.rationale: Maps a current behavior surface to one behavior commitment.

source_surfaces.label: surface.pm_visible_summary
source_surfaces.rationale: Maps a current behavior surface to one behavior commitment.

source_surfaces.label: surface.authorized_result_reads
source_surfaces.rationale: Maps a current behavior surface to one behavior commitment.

source_surfaces.label: surface.release_evidence
source_surfaces.rationale: Maps a current behavior surface to one behavior commitment.

projection.rationale: Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.
Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.
Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.

fields.scoped_out_reason: Historical field names are forbidden inputs and cannot advance current runtime.

groups.rationale: Role-authored summary is a required current output field, not runtime-authored semantics.
PM packet summary context is a derived navigation aid, not a decision substitute.
Authorized material reads define required current input material.
Retired names may appear only as negative fixtures or historical labels.

plan.notes: No new fields are introduced; existing current fields are assigned lifecycle and evidence boundaries.

projections.rationale: Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.
Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.
Behavior-bearing current-contract field is projected to model, code, and tests.

report.summary: All discovered fields are accounted and behavior-bearing fields are projected.

findings.message: primary path failure is masked by automatic alternate success
old field or backup cache returns success after primary field/path failure
business intent has more than one primary runtime authority
broad primary-path authority claim requires current Cartesian coverage receipt ids
broad primary-path authority claim requires TestMesh-owned coverage shard ids
broad primary-path authority claim requires Risk Evidence Ledger gate ids
path-sensitive commitment must carry Primary Path Authority evidence
PPA binding must preserve the primary path ids for the commitment
broad behavior claim requires current passing commitment evidence

findings.action: project the field into a model obligation, transition cell, code contract, or scoped-out reason
findings.message: behavior-bearing field has no model/code/test projection or scoped-out reason

report.summary: Field lifecycle has blockers for full confidence.

accepted_without_summary: role result accepted without required PM-visible summary
missing summary path completed without contract block and reissue
blocked_without_reissue: missing summary path completed without contract block and reissue
missing summary contract block did not reissue current packet family
generic_repair_overrode_concrete_repair: semantic blocker did not preserve concrete required repair
PM repair packet fell back to generic reviewer failure despite concrete repair
pm_packet_missing_summary_context: PM packet missed recent role-authored report summary
runner_synthesized_summary: runner synthesized PM-visible summary instead of relaying role-authored text
PM packet received summary context from a result that had no role-authored summary
missing summary path completed without contract block and reissue
PM summary context exists without role-authored summary

state.pm_recommended_resolution: replace stale lifecycle path with current lifecycle path

proof_evidence.summary: All discovered fields are accounted and behavior-bearing fields are projected.
Existing PM-visible role summary model and source checks remain green.
Global synthetic fake-agent D-card matrix covers no-fallback families.
Model-test alignment consumes the FlowGuard 0.53 maintenance family.
